nasb.text: He made its horns on its four corners, its horns being of one piece with it, and he overlaid it with bronze.

esv.text: He made horns for it on its four corners. Its horns were of one piece with it, and he overlaid it with bronze.

cnv.text: 在壇的四個拐角做了四隻角，角是與壇連在一起的；又用銅把壇包裹。

ccb.text: 在坛的四角造四个角状物，与坛连成一体，祭坛外面包上铜。
